name: Old Fashsioned Pancake Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except maple flavoring in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Stir constantly and continue boiling until the syrup is full-bodied when poured from a spoon, about 10 minutes.
4. Allow the syrup to cool to lukewarm temperatures.
5. Stir in the maple flavoring.
6. Pour the syrup into sterile bottles.
7. Makes about 7 cups. Each tablespoon contains approximately 4 calories, 0 grams protein, 0 grams fat, 11 grams carbohydrates, 15 milligrams sodium, and 0 mg cholesterol.
Store for up to 4 weeks in the refrigerator.
